/usr/bin/ar qc libgptoss_kernels.a CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/mxfp4_dequant.cu.o CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/rmsnorm.cu.o CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/rope.cu.o CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/swiglu.cu.o CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/flash_attention.cu.o CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/paged_attention.cu.o CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/topk_softmax.cu.o CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/moe_permute.cu.o CMakeFiles/gptoss_kernels.dir/src/kernels/moe_combine.cu.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgptoss_kernels.a
